sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 63:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 63:1
items.html: The expansion of the lower nine of SAG inside the inner MA and BON of AK caused the connection of the two Heys together, which is the association of the quality of mercy with judgement. (Ibid.)
